label: The Big Bang
description: The beginning of the universe, space, and time itself.

label: First Stars & Galaxies
description: The first stars ignite, ending the cosmic dark ages.

label: Formation of the Sun
description: Our star is born from a collapsing cloud of gas and dust.

label: Formation of the Earth
description: Earth forms from the leftover debris of the Sun's formation.

label: First Evidence of Life
description: Earliest traces of single-celled life appear in the oceans.

label: Photosynthesis Begins
description: Life starts using sunlight to produce energy, releasing oxygen as a byproduct.

label: Complex Cells (Eukaryotes)
description: Cells with nuclei and organelles evolve, paving the way for complex life.

label: Multicellular Life
description: Individual cells begin to work together, forming larger organisms.

label: Cambrian Explosion
description: A rapid diversification of animal life leads to most major phyla.

label: Permian-Triassic Extinction
description: The 'Great Dying' – the largest mass extinction in Earth's history.

label: First Dinosaurs
description: The era of the dinosaurs begins.

label: Dinosaur Extinction
description: A massive asteroid impact ends the reign of the dinosaurs.

label: Human-Chimp Ancestor
description: The last common ancestor of humans and chimpanzees lived around this time.

label: Genus Homo & Stone Tools
description: Our ancestors begin using stone tools, a major technological leap.

label: Modern Humans (Homo sapiens)
description: Anatomically modern humans evolve in Africa.

label: Cognitive Revolution
description: Humans develop complex language, art, and abstract thought.

label: Agricultural Revolution
description: Transition from hunter-gatherer lifestyles to settled farming.

label: First Civilizations
description: Sumer, Egypt, and the invention of writing mark the start of recorded history.

label: Scientific Revolution
description: Modern science begins to transform our understanding of the world.

label: Industrial Revolution
description: Steam power and machinery lead to rapid global industrialization.

label: Today
description: The Information Age and the beginning of the Anthropocene.

label: Future Asteroid Impact
description: Earth will likely be hit by another dinosaur-scale asteroid.

label: Earth Becomes Uninhabitable
description: The Sun's increasing heat evaporates the oceans.

label: Milky Way-Andromeda Collision
description: Our galaxy begins to merge with the Andromeda galaxy.

label: Sun Becomes a Red Giant
description: The Sun expands, likely consuming Mercury, Venus, and Earth.

label: The Last Stars Die
description: The Stelliferous Era ends as the last red dwarfs burn out.

label: Heat Death of the Universe
description: The universe reaches maximum entropy, and nothing ever happens again.
